remarks: This charming and updated colonial home, steeped in gracious style and beautiful natural light, is a great place for entertaining. It's set on a gorgeous professionally landscaped flat acre+ with heated pool and is located on one of Darien's most desirable in-town streets. A spacious living room with fireplace flows into a generous formal dining room and sunroom, both of which have wall-to-wall windows overlooking the oasis-like back yard. The heart of this home is the spectacular chef's kitchen with a 12 foot quartzite island, 6-burner gas range, double ovens, and incredible storage. Also on the first level is a bright and inviting family room with stone fireplace, vaulted ceiling and built-ins, a dedicated office, a back hallway/mudroom, and a sizeable serene first floor primary/in-law suite with French doors out to its own deck area. Upstairs are 6 bedrooms and 4 baths, including the dramatic primary suite with Juliette balcony and extensive closets. The third level has a sunny versatile room to be used however you please, a cedar closet and two attics for storage. Outside, don't miss the amazing picket-fenced vegetable/flower garden for you to grow your own. Enjoy life in this truly extraordinary home and property.
